items.name: Goldlika: MLU on top
items.description:
For this funny clan that likes getting free UGCs…

Wait… Is MLU real? Nah, maybe not.
It’s just MarioALDV trying to get attention, I guess…

Anyways, I wonder who the members of this clan are…

Maybe just MarioALDV will claim all 20 copies of this UGC XD
We don’t know, we will never know…

Why is it 20 copies and not 38?
What did the other 18 people do?
We don’t know, they will never know o_O

I like this chain, it looks so retro!
Please MarioALDV, give me the code for this item, I need it :D
I can’t, sorry… it’s all for me….

I like C3’s items, I always get 10–15 every day :D
IDK why the Iceworld event got postponed, maybe it will come out next month.

I like how I started the year, I dropped a 100-stock item.
Maybe I’ll do more in the future :)
About this chain… I don’t know xd

MLU started as a joke and it’s still a joke, it’s not real… o_O
Well… I don’t know when I’m going to make this limited, but yeah,
I’m happy with how this item looks.

Literally made in 3 hours XD

MLU ON TOP!

items.name: kitty shades!!
items.description:
introducing the purr-fect fashion accessory for all the trendsetters out there - the kitty shades! get ready to make a bold style statement with these limited edition UGC shades that combine cuteness and coolness in one irresistible package.

designed with an enchanting pastel pink color, accented by a delicate white outline, these shades are sure to turn heads wherever you go. but that's not all! adorning the front of these fabulous frames are mesmerizing glowing hearts that radiate warmth and affection. it's like wearing love on your face!

but wait, there's more! as if the hearts weren't enough to melt hearts, the kitty shades also feature a delightful glowing kitty paw, adding a touch of whimsy and charm. it's as if a playful feline companion is always by your side, brightening up your day with its adorable presence!

join lucids UGC for more upcoming adorable items! - https://www.roblox.com/groups/32642659/lucids-UGC#!/about
